notes: Standard auto-pipeline rollup. The one item of interest hidden inside this 'automated' bucket is commit a149edf's regeneration of daily_review.json — it left registry_ratio_pct=94.5 and refined=4 unchanged despite PRED-105's window having closed 4+ days ago. That finding is flagged in chg-20260422-1011-001 (substantive/HIGH) rather than here, because the strategic interpretation (pipeline-canonical denominator exclusion) belongs with the PRED-105 record. Counterargument for record: one could argue the auto-pipeline has no logic to promote a silently-unreported prospective to refined — the pipeline writes only what its input files say, so the unchanged numbers merely reflect that the author never wrote a verdict anywhere upstream. That is consistent with the silent-ignore interpretation rather than contradicting it. Only a manual commit touching the scorecard/registry would indicate adjudication.
